messages.qtyMultiples: Quantity to be converted must be in multiples of lot Size
messages.nullQty: Quantity to be converted cannot be 0
messages.greaterQuantity: The quantity to be converted cannot be greater than the available quantity.
messages.mtfConversionTime: Request is accepted only between 9 AM and 7 PM on trading days.
messages.mtfRmsValidation: Position conversion depends on margin availability and will be processed on the next trading day.
messages.mtfPositionCancel: If you sell this MTF position, the position conversion request may be cancelled.
messages.cancelMtfRequest: You are about to cancel this request. Please check the details and confirm.

freshPledge.text: Converting this position may impact the pledge request for this symbol.

previouslyPledged.text: Converting this position may reduce this symbol's pledged quantity and collateral margin.
